name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript Registry
notes: This Building Block detects modification or creation of UserInitMprLogonScript
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, System.Registry Addition
when the event matches Target Object (custom) contains any of Environment\UserInitMprLogonScript
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, System.Registry Addition
AND when the event matches Target Object (custom) contains any of Environment\UserInitMprLogonScript
